relabelled_senses.definition: A brief written description or sketch that outlines a person's appearance, character, or situation.
An extremely large crowd of people; a densely packed throng.
A person who enjoys and is comfortable with interacting with others; sociable and good at dealing with people.
A noticeable liveliness or briskness in a person's walk, indicating energy or good spirits.
The practice of publicly parading a person who has been arrested, often in handcuffs, so that they can be photographed or filmed by the press.
A person who interrupts someone in the midst of a creative thought or composition, causing the loss of inspiration or the disruption of the creative process.

A popular-psychology label for an adult, often perceived as male, who persistently resists assuming the responsibilities and obligations of adulthood and who clings to childlike behaviors and attitudes.

A situation in which two or more people repeatedly call each other at different times but continually miss one another, resulting in a series of missed calls and returned calls; the back-and-forth of unsuccessful telephone attempts.
An informal musical gathering in which participants play stringed instruments (especially guitars, banjos, or mandolins) and enjoy themselves; a relaxed jam session.
The first or best choice selected from a group, originally referring to the best animal chosen from a litter of newborns.
To choose selectively which disputes, arguments, or issues are worth engaging in, avoiding unnecessary or unwinnable confrontations.
A retort or admonition urging a bully or aggressor to confront someone of similar strength, age, or status rather than targeting a weaker person.
To choose or select someone or something at random or by chance, without systematic method.
To question or consult someone in order to obtain information, ideas, advice, or expertise.
To withdraw from an activity, negotiation, or contest in a petulant or defeated manner; to abandon efforts and leave after being unable or unwilling to continue.
To increase speed or move faster.
To pay the bill for goods or services, especially for a meal or drinks shared with others.
To resume an interrupted line of activity, thought, or narrative after a pause or disruption.
to understand the meaning, implication, or intent of what someone is saying or signaling
visually flawless or ideally composed, as in an image, scene, or appearance
